title: Faster folder opens and file preview
description:
PipeShare file loading was still slow because every folder click bypassed cache and paid full backend work again. This batch fixes that so browsing feels snappy.

Explorer: shallow folder listings now reuse memory/session cache (correct shallow cache keys), BASE boot no longer wipes a good cache or force-refetches every time, and the server skips full-job hash merging on shallow tree calls.

Files: video/PDF open with presign only (no extra HeadObject meta trip); PDF preview streams from Wasabi in the iframe instead of downloading the whole file first; download auth is cached for all users for 60s.

Who is affected: PipeShare on BASE (and SaaS after Push).
changeLog: Reuse shallow tree cache on folder open (no bypassCache on every click).
Match shallow cache keys on boot/hydrate so revisits are instant.
Skip full-job SHA merge on shallow /tree listings.
Video/PDF preview: presign-only path; PDF iframe loads Wasabi directly.
Cache path-download auth for all users (60s) to speed repeated opens.
